creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
Unfortunately FreeBSD doesn't have support of suspend to idle (or "Modern Standby"). There were some work on it in the past ( review D17675, review D17676), but currently no activity on it and it is in almost unusable state.
Another chance - your BIOS may have an option to switch to a legacy S3 mode. This worked on an earlier generations [1].

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-October/004804.html
